home.heroHeadline: Your Trusted Construction Materials Partner in Kigali
home.heroSubheadline: Premium-quality building supplies, fast assistance, and a professional team you can rely on.
home.why1Desc: Carefully selected materials from reputable suppliers.
home.why2Desc: Get guidance on the right product for the job.
home.why3Desc: Strong value for professionals and homeowners.
home.aboutText: We serve Kigali with reliable construction materials and a premium customer experience—built for contractors, engineers, and homeowners.

about.visionText: To become the leading provider of quality construction materials in Rwanda, recognized for excellence, reliability, and innovation in serving the building industry.
about.missionText: To provide high-quality construction materials and exceptional service to contractors, engineers, and homeowners in Kigali, helping them build better and more efficiently.
